title: Neutradol Fresh Lily VAC Scents Carpet Freshener & Deodorizer 350g (2 Pack)
features: SOLD AS A TWO PACK (2x bottles 350g each) Freshy Lily - blended around subtle, earthy patchouli which brings fresh and charming aroma full of various floral tones
Odour Elimination: Unlike air fresheners that merely mask odours, this hygienic formula destroys unpleasant smells using scientific principles.
Versatile Usage: Suitable for eliminating bad odours in homes, workspaces, offices, hallways, or vehicles. Destroys odours: Cooking, waste, pets, smoke.
Convenient Packaging: The easy-to-use powder is packaged in a shaker container for effortless application.
Enhances Ambience: The luxurious fragrance enhances the mood and atmosphere of any room or space.

WARNINGS: Not recommended for carpet tiles or anything similar. Do not use on wet carpets. Contains perfumes so some pets and people may be sensitive to some perfumes. Remove pets from room before use and until after vacuumed. Keep out of reach of children. Wash hands after use. USE ONLY AS DIRECTED ON PACKAGING
description: Product description Neutradol Vac N' Fresh Carpet Freshener in the Fresh Lily fragrance is a powdered carpet deodoriser that utilises a unique hygienic formula to eliminate unpleasant odours in the home, workspaces, offices, hallways or cars. Unlike air fresheners that merely mask bad smells, Neutradol destroys them through scientific means. The Fresh Lily scent recalls all those precious and touching moments, blended around subtle, earthy patchouli which brings fresh and charming aroma full of various floral tones. Simply shake the powder onto carpets and upholstery, allow it to work for 15 minutes, then vacuum up for a refreshingly clean and inviting fragrance. Ingredients Carpet Cleaning Powder Directions Shake the dust on carpets and upholstery, leave it on for 15 minutes, then vacuum for a pleasantly clean and inviting fragrance.
